summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Office Automation app. All major features functional with mocked APIs. Minor navigation UX issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation items exist but clicks don't trigger page navigation reliably
User disconnect functionality not easily accessible in expected location

passed_tests: Landing page renders with hero section and Connect Google Account button
Google OAuth simulation shows success state with correct user email
Dashboard navigation from landing page works
Dashboard displays all 4 summary cards (Invoices, Meetings, Approvals, System Status)
All 6 pages accessible via direct URL (Dashboard, Invoice Manager, Meeting Summarizer, Approval Center, HR Connect, Settings)
Invoice Manager upload zone and search/filter functionality present
Meeting Summarizer tabs (Upload Audio, Paste Transcript) functional
Approval Center displays pending approvals section
HR Connect shows connection status card and workflow buttons
Settings page shows Connected Accounts, Approved Vendors, and Notification Preferences
Interactive elements work: vendor management, notification toggles
Mocked API responses populate all pages correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix sidebar navigation click handlers to ensure reliable page navigation. Improve user disconnect UX in top bar dropdown.
